title: Seska Superfunnymagicshow
description: Crazier than finding a penguin in your fridge, one of the UK’s funniest family friendly comedians is back with a new bonkers show! Turbo-charged Seska is loved by families throughout the UK and Europe. His fast-paced super interactive magic show sells out at festivals and arts centres leaving audiences with a huge grin on their faces. Entertaining crowds from Mumbai to Trinidad and a firm favourite at Camp Bestival, his skills and jokes keep mum and dad glued to the show too. Endearing, charismatic, colorful and chaotic, comedian Seska delivers a superb show every time! WINNER – Spirit of Fringe Award: Colchester Fringe Festival WINNER – Best Family Show: Mumbai Theatre Festival WINNER – Best Solo Show: Banjul Arts Festival NOMINATED – Best Kids Show: Leicester Comedy Festival “One of the world’s top comedy magicians.” BBC Radio “The funniest comedian entertaining families in the UK!” London Evening Standard

venue.name: The Nightingale @ The Grand Central Pub
